stories.title: RLWRLD releases RLDX-1, a dexterity-first foundation model for robot hands
stories.summary: RLWRLD said with RLDX-1, it aimed to include things like context memorization or force sensing, which existing models often lack. The post RLWRLD releases RLDX-1, a dexterity-first foundation model for robot hands appeared first on The Robot Report .
